name: mental-health
description: NeuroPredict — MERN stack mental health prediction app

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.dev: npm run dev:client & npm run dev:server
scripts.build: npm install --prefix client --include=dev && npm run build --prefix client && rm -rf server/public && mkdir -p server/public && cp -R client/dist/. server/public/ && npm install --prefix server
